name: fabric-powerbi-toolkit
displayName: Fabric & Power BI Toolkit for Claude
description: Auto-configures MCP servers for Microsoft Fabric (138+ tools), Power BI Modeling, and Translation Audit. Generates CLAUDE.md knowledge base for Claude Code.

walkthroughs.title: Get Started with Fabric & Power BI Toolkit
walkthroughs.description: Set up MCP servers for Microsoft Fabric and Power BI in Claude Code.

steps.title: Check Prerequisites
steps.description:
Verify Python 3.12+, uv, Azure CLI, and .NET 9.x are installed.

[Check Prerequisites](command:fabricPowerbi.checkPrereqs)

steps.title: Run Full Setup
steps.description:
Install MCP servers, copy knowledge base, and generate .mcp.json config.

[Run Full Setup](command:fabricPowerbi.setupWorkspace)

steps.title: Sign in to Azure
steps.description:
MCP tools need Azure authentication to access Fabric resources. Open a terminal and run ``az login``.

[Open Terminal](command:workbench.action.terminal.new)

steps.title: Restart Claude Code
steps.description:
Close and reopen Claude Code so it picks up the new .mcp.json configuration. You should see 3 MCP servers load:
- **fabric-core** — 138+ Fabric tools
- **powerbi-modeling** — Live semantic model editing
- **powerbi-translation-audit** — Translation validation

steps.title: Try It Out
steps.description:
Open Claude Code and try these commands:
- *"List my Fabric workspaces"*
- *"Show tables in my lakehouse"*
- *"Create a DAX measure for total sales"*

See [CLAUDE.md](command:markdown.showPreview) in your workspace for the full tool reference.
